name: FNB Top40 ETF
dividend: Quarterly | Last 4: Dec 2025: 55.88 cpu, Sep 2025: 78.86 cpu, Jun 2025: 95.85 cpu, Mar 2025: 32.47 cpu
index_rules: To provide investors with exposure to the SA equities market through a JSE-listed ETF. Invests in the 40 biggest JSE-listed companies by market capitalisation, tracking the FTSE/JSE Top40 Index in proportion to index weightings. Pays quarterly distributions comprising dividends and interest earned from underlying shares.
